TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == u habay hananay == siwkay a lacul Pakayni ikamu tu "habay" u lalengatan itiniay i dietu adihay ku kasasiluma a katinakuan a kamu, du'du ini i laenu; izaw ku cecay a demiad, malalisan ci Nakaw, dengkini madu'eng, caenget ku tangila, tanu limaen niza mingangiwngiw ku tangila, mangaiwngiw ku cecay masakimuluay, yatu belet han niza a mibahekul. izaw ku pina a demiad, tuya pibahekulan niza malengaw ku pina a lengus, ciheci satu, alaen ku cecay a palahekad, tuyana tu i, saadihay satu ku mimingay a masacecacecay, ala han ni Nakaw ku cecay, cikciken a misaadihay, padpad hank u cecay, palahekad sa tu cecay dangah a misahulu, malaemi edid tu ku heci, nama cikcik tu itiya, uya edid emi i, anu nengnengen hatu namacikcikay mansa izaw ku kinacikcik a tulis. iayaw ku liteng na izaway hu ku maluay i ci Langasan, kahubucan ni cilucidal, painien tu manmaanan a sapaluma, pakabana'en hu tu pinangan tu sasamaanen a paluma ku edid mikecu. u luma satu a kamu pakayni i maciwciw nu Sakizaya, izaway ku kamu tu belac mala ciyakay sanay a kamu; itiya hu, izaw ku cecay a ba'inayan a wawa ci Chiyaudai ku nganagn niza, tu demidemiad deng minukaay aca ku demak niza. u sapilileng niza tu 'acucul u kaeled, cahu cahu malaheci tu nila a mikalkal ku kakahaday a buyu. paluma tu ciyak atu 'auk, maluhem kuya ciyak atu mieikes tu ku 'auk i, masadak nai ciyak ku belac, masadak aca nai 'auk ku diyaung, saka u tada ci habayay ciniza i niyazu'. Cahu cahu mapuyapuy ku babahi mahubuc sa u 'unel ku wawa. u sulit nu Hulam Á≤ü(Ś≠łŚźć:Setaria italica),šļ¶Á®ĪÁ≤Ī,Á®∑, . u sulit nu Amilika Foxtail millet (Chinese: ŚįŹÁĪ≥; botanic name Setaria italica, synonym Panicum italicum L.) is an annual grass grown for human food. It is the second-most widely planted species of millet, and the most important in East Asia. It has the longest history of cultivation among the millets, having been grown in India since antiquity. According to recent research, it was first domesticated in China around 6,000 BC. Other names for the species include dwarf setaria, foxtail bristle-grass, giant setaria, green foxtail, Italian millet, German millet, and Hungarian millet.
S.PHON: == u ńßabaj ńßananaj == siwkaj a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ pakajni ikamu tu "ńßabaj" u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčatan itiniaj i di…ôtu adińßaj ku kasasir~…ĺuma a katinakuan a kamu, du Ē~ °du ini i r~…ĺa…ônu; izaw ku ¶…ô ¶aj a d…ômiad, mar~…ĺar~…ĺisan ¶i nakaw, d…ôŇčkini madu Ē~ °…ôŇč, ¶a…ôŇč…ôt ku taŇčir~…ĺa, tanu r~…ĺima…ôn niza miŇčaŇčiwŇčiw ku taŇčir~…ĺa, maŇčaiwŇčiw ku ¶…ô ¶aj masakimur~…ĺuaj, jatu b…ôr~…ĺ…ôt ńßan niza a mibańß…ôkur~…ĺ. izaw ku pina a d…ômiad, tuja pibańß…ôkur~…ĺan niza mar~…ĺ…ôŇčaw ku pina a r~…ĺ…ôŇčus, ¶ińß…ô ¶i satu, ar~…ĺa…ôn ku ¶…ô ¶aj a par~…ĺańß…ôkad, tujana tu i, saadińßaj satu ku mimiŇčaj a masa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj, ar~…ĺa ńßan ni nakaw ku ¶…ô ¶aj, ¶ik ¶ik…ôn a misaadińßaj, padpad ńßank u ¶…ô ¶aj, par~…ĺańß…ôkad sa tu ¶…ô ¶aj daŇčańß a misańßur~…ĺu, mar~…ĺa…ômi …ôdid tu ku ńß…ô ¶i, nama ¶ik ¶ik tu itija, uja …ôdid …ômi i, anu n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ńßatu nama ¶ik ¶ikaj mansa izaw ku kina ¶ik ¶ik a tur~…ĺis. iajaw ku r~…ĺit…ôŇč na izawaj ńßu ku mar~…ĺuaj i ¶i r~…ĺaŇčasan, kańßubu ¶an ni ¶ir~…ĺu ¶idar~…ĺ, paini…ôn tu manmaanan a sapar~…ĺuma, pakabana Ē~ °…ôn ńßu tu pinaŇčan tu sasamaan…ôn a par~…ĺuma ku …ôdid mik…ô ¶u. u r~…ĺuma satu a kamu pakajni i ma ¶iw ¶iw nu sakizaja, izawaj ku kamu tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺa ¶ijakaj sanaj a kamu; itija ńßu, izaw ku ¶…ô ¶aj a ba Ē~ °inajan a wawa ¶i ¶ńßijaudai ku Ňčanagn niza, tu d…ômid…ômiad d…ôŇč minukaaj a ¶a ku d…ômak niza. u sapir~…ĺir~…ĺ…ôŇč niza tu Ē~ °a ¶u ¶ur~…ĺ u ka…ôr~…ĺ…ôd, ¶ańßu ¶ańßu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nir~…ĺa a mikar~…ĺkar~…ĺ ku kakańßadaj a buju. par~…ĺuma tu ¶ijak atu Ē~ °auk, mar~…ĺuńß…ôm kuja ¶ijak atu mi…ôik…ôs tu ku Ē~ °auk i, masadak nai ¶ijak ku b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, masadak a ¶a nai Ē~ °auk ku dijauŇč, saka u tada ¶i ńßabajaj ¶iniza i nijazu Ē~ °. ¶ańßu ¶ańßu mapujapuj ku babańßi mańßubu ¶ sa u Ē~ °un…ôr~…ĺ ku wawa. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *(**:s…ôtaria itar~…ĺi ¶a),***,*, . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika fo*tair~…ĺ mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: **; botani ¶ nam…ô s…ôtaria itar~…ĺi ¶a, sjnonjm pani ¶um itar~…ĺi ¶um r~…ĺ.) is an annuar~…ĺ grass grown for ńßuman food. it is tńß…ô s…ô ¶ond-most wid…ôr~…ĺj pr~…ĺant…ôd sp…ô ¶i…ôs of mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, and tńß…ô most important in …ôast asia. it ńßas tńß…ô r~…ĺoŇč…ôst ńßistorj of ¶ur~…ĺti*ation amoŇč tńß…ô mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôts, ńßa*iŇč b…ô…ôn grown in india sin ¶…ô anti*uitj. a ¶ ¶ordiŇč to r…ô ¶…ônt r…ôs…ôar ¶ńß, it was first dom…ôsti ¶at…ôd in ¶ńßina around *,*** b ¶. otńß…ôr nam…ôs for tńß…ô sp…ô ¶i…ôs in ¶r~…ĺud…ô dwarf s…ôtaria, fo*tair~…ĺ bristr~…ĺ…ô-grass, giant s…ôtaria, gr…ô…ôn fo*tair~…ĺ, itar~…ĺian mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, g…ôrman mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, and ńßuŇčarian mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt.
S.FORM: == u habay hananay == siwkay a lacul Pakayni ikamu tu "habay" u lalengatan itiniay i dietu adihay ku kasasiluma a katinakuan a kamu, du'du ini i laenu; izaw ku cecay a demiad, malalisan ci Nakaw, dengkini madu'eng, caenget ku tangila, tanu limaen niza mingangiwngiw ku tangila, mangaiwngiw ku cecay masakimuluay, yatu belet han niza a mibahekul. izaw ku pina a demiad, tuya pibahekulan niza malengaw ku pina a lengus, ciheci satu, alaen ku cecay a palahekad, tuyana tu i, saadihay satu ku mimingay a masacecacecay, ala han ni Nakaw ku cecay, cikciken a misaadihay, padpad hank u cecay, palahekad sa tu cecay dangah a misahulu, malaemi edid tu ku heci, nama cikcik tu itiya, uya edid emi i, anu nengnengen hatu namacikcikay mansa izaw ku kinacikcik a tulis. iayaw ku liteng na izaway hu ku maluay i ci Langasan, kahubucan ni cilucidal, painien tu manmaanan a sapaluma, pakabana'en hu tu pinangan tu sasamaanen a paluma ku edid mikecu. u luma satu a kamu pakayni i maciwciw nu Sakizaya, izaway ku kamu tu belac mala ciyakay sanay a kamu; itiya hu, izaw ku cecay a ba'inayan a wawa ci Chiyaudai ku nganagn niza, tu demidemiad deng minukaay aca ku demak niza. u sapilileng niza tu 'acucul u kaeled, cahu cahu malaheci tu nila a mikalkal ku kakahaday a buyu. paluma tu ciyak atu 'auk, maluhem kuya ciyak atu mieikes tu ku 'auk i, masadak nai ciyak ku belac, masadak aca nai 'auk ku diyaung, saka u tada ci habayay ciniza i niyazu'. Cahu cahu mapuyapuy ku babahi mahubuc sa u 'unel ku wawa. u sulit nu Hulam Á≤ü(Ś≠łŚźć:Setaria italica),šļ¶Á®ĪÁ≤Ī,Á®∑, . u sulit nu Amilika Foxtail millet (Chinese: ŚįŹÁĪ≥; botanic name Setaria italica, synonym Panicum italicum L.) is an annual grass grown for human food. It is the second-most widely planted species of millet, and the most important in East Asia. It has the longest history of cultivation among the millets, having been grown in India since antiquity. According to recent research, it was first domesticated in China around 6,000 BC. Other names for the species include dwarf setaria, foxtail bristle-grass, giant setaria, green foxtail, Italian millet, German millet, and Hungarian millet.

itija ńßu, izaw ku ¶…ô ¶aj a ba Ē~ °inajan a wawa ¶i ¶ńßijaudai ku Ňčanagn niza, tu d…ômid…ômiad d…ôŇč minukaaj a ¶a ku d…ômak niza. u sapir~…ĺir~…ĺ…ôŇč niza tu Ē~ °a ¶u ¶ur~…ĺ u ka…ôr~…ĺ…ôd, ¶ańßu ¶ańßu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nir~…ĺa a mikar~…ĺkar~…ĺ ku kakańßadaj a buju. par~…ĺuma tu ¶ijak atu Ē~ °auk, mar~…ĺuńß…ôm kuja ¶ijak atu mi…ôik…ôs tu ku Ē~ °auk i, masadak nai ¶ijak ku b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, masadak a ¶a nai Ē~ °auk ku dijauŇč, saka u tada ¶i ńßabajaj ¶iniza i nijazu Ē~ °. ¶ańßu ¶ańßu mapujapuj ku babańßi mańßubu ¶ sa u Ē~ °un…ôr~…ĺ ku wawa. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *(**:s…ôtaria itar~…ĺi ¶a),***,*, . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika fo*tair~…ĺ mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: **; botani ¶ nam…ô s…ôtaria itar~…ĺi ¶a, sjnonjm pani ¶um itar~…ĺi ¶um r~…ĺ.) is an annuar~…ĺ grass grown for ńßuman food. it is tńß…ô s…ô ¶ond-most wid…ôr~…ĺj pr~…ĺant…ôd sp…ô ¶i…ôs of mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, and tńß…ô most important in …ôast asia. it ńßas tńß…ô r~…ĺoŇč…ôst ńßistorj of ¶ur~…ĺti*ation amoŇč tńß…ô mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôts, ńßa*iŇč b…ô…ôn grown in india sin ¶…ô anti*uitj. a ¶ ¶ordiŇč to r…ô ¶…ônt r…ôs…ôar ¶ńß, it was first dom…ôsti ¶at…ôd in ¶ńßina around *,*** b ¶. otńß…ôr nam…ôs for tńß…ô sp…ô ¶i…ôs in ¶r~…ĺud…ô dwarf s…ôtaria, fo*tair~…ĺ bristr~…ĺ…ô-grass, giant s…ôtaria, gr…ô…ôn fo*tair~…ĺ, itar~…ĺian mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, g…ôrman mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt, and ńßuŇčarian mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôt.
